creator: Donald.J.Maddox@scsn.net
text:
The Xmfract package on freefall.cdrom.com is linked dynamically
with Motif libs, and is therefore not usable by anyone who does
not have Motif installed on their system.

Fix: 

Recompile the package so that it is statically linked with the
Motif libs...
How-To-Repeat: 
    Try to run Xmfract from the above named package on a machine that
does not have Motif installed.  Watch it fail, complaining that it
cannot find libXm.so.?.?.
